info.name: Chasma Bazar API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for Chasma Bazar Backend

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Classic Black Frame",
  "sku": "CBF-001",
  "type": "optical",
  "frameType": "{{frame_id}}",
  "userCategory": "Men",
  "description": "Classic and elegant black frame with premium acetate material",
  "price": 2999,
  "productDiscount": 10,
  "company": "{{company_id}}",
  "colors": [
    {
      "color": "Black",
      "hexCode": "#000000",
      "images": [
        {
          "type": "normal",
          "url": "https://example.com/black-front.jpg",
          "public_id": "black_front_123",
          "alt": "Black frame front view"
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "stock": 50,
  "specsType": "eyeglasses",
  "model": "Classic-001",
  "material": "Acetate",
  "weight": 25,
  "dimensions": {
    "height": 45,
    "width": 140,
    "depth": 145
  },
  "warranty": {
    "duration": 12,
    "durationType": "months",
    "description": "1 year manufacturer warranty"
  },
  "isFeatured": false,
  "tags": ["classic", "formal", "black"],
  "ageGroup": "adults"
}

{
  "name": "Ray-Ban",
  "description": "Leading eyewear brand known for iconic sunglasses",
  "email": "contact@rayban.com",
  "phone": "1234567890",
  "address": {
    "street": "123 Fashion Street",
    "city": "Mumbai",
    "state": "Maharashtra",
    "country": "India",
    "pinCode": "400001"
  },
  "establishedYear": 1937
}

{
  "name": "Summer Sale",
  "description": "20% off on all sunglasses",
  "discountType": "percentage",
  "discountValue": 20,
  "maxDiscount": 1000,
  "applicableOn": "category",
  "applicableCategories": ["Men", "Women"],
  "startDate": "2024-06-01",
  "endDate": "2024-08-31",
  "minOrderValue": 2000,
  "isActive": true,
  "isAutoApplied": true
}

{
  "name": "John Doe",
  "addressType": "home",
  "address": "123 Main Street, Apartment 4B",
  "city": "Mumbai",
  "state": "Maharashtra",
  "country": "India",
  "pincode": "400001",
  "phone": "9876543210",
  "alternatePhone": "9123456789",
  "landmark": "Near City Mall",
  "isDefault": true
}

{
  "title": "Summer Sale 2024",
  "description": "Get up to 50% off on all sunglasses",
  "image": "https://example.com/banner.jpg",
  "buttonText": "Shop Now",
  "buttonLink": "/products?category=sunglasses",
  "pages": ["home", "products"],
  "position": "top",
  "isActive": true,
  "priority": 10,
  "startDate": "2024-06-01",
  "endDate": "2024-08-31"
}

request.description: Get performance metrics including: conversionRate, avgSessionDuration, bounceRate, newSessions, avgOrderValue, userGrowth

query.description: Page number (optional - if not provided, returns all orders)
Filter by status: pending, processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled

request.description: Get recent orders with optional pagination and status filter. Without page/limit params, returns all orders.
